content.text:
I'm ready to help you with file search and codebase exploration. I understand this is a read-only task - I will not create, write, or modify any files.

I see you have a well-structured React + TypeScript project called "Neuman Brain Dashboard" - a privacy-first productivity platform. The codebase is currently at 115KB gzipped with zero TypeScript/ESLint errors.

What would you like me to search for or explore in the codebase?
